name: Tuna Cakes with Dill Tartar Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a skillet with cooking spray and heat over medium-high heat.
2. Saute the celery and onion until tender, then transfer to a bowl.
3. Add cream cheese and lemon juice to the bowl.
4. Mix in red pepper flakes and breadcrumbs.
5. Stir in dried dill and tuna from the can, dividing the mixture into 8 equal portions.
6. In the same skillet over medium-high heat, cook 4 cakes for 2 minutes on each side.
7. Repeat with the remaining 4 cakes.
8. Combine the tartar sauce ingredients in a small bowl.
9. Serve the tuna cakes with the dill tartar sauce.
